# Extração: 12.02-Blood Pressure Brief

- **Fonte:** 12.02-Blood Pressure Brief.docx
- **Tipo:** DOCX

1. Who’s the Audience?



Women and men over the age of 45 who have high blood pressure and who are worried about their heart health. They are concerned they may have a heart attack, a stroke, or heart failure. Their doctor has told them to diet and exercise, or they’ve been put on ACE Inhibitors, ARBs, or Beta Blockers for their blood pressure. They may worry about heart attacks running in the family, or stress. They are afraid of the suddenness and severity of a heart attack. They may have even had a heart attack in the past, and be afraid that another one is coming. 





2. What are the pain points, or biggest fears?

(+ identify the 1-3 HUGE ones, while the rest are secondary)



- Short Term:

The fear and anxiety of having high blood pressure, that it indicates a ticking time bomb, a countdown timer until their hearts blow up. 



The physical pain of having a heart attack. Plus the longer-term effects of missing work, being disabled, unable to do the things they love.



Post heart attack, feeling tired all of the time. Fear of a second heart attack. Fear of heart failure. Fear of getting old. Fear of death. 







-Long Term:

Not being able to do the activities they love. Not being there for their family, their loved ones. Not getting to see their grandchildren grow up. Not getting to do all of the things on their bucket list. Leaving this world too soon. 





3. So by reversing the pain points/biggest fears, what is the one big promise (1-3 sentences) you are going to make…how this will change their lives forever?



Going to show you how to naturally and rapidly get your high blood pressure under control. This breakthrough comes from the study of how plants breathe. It turns out that the same molecule that helps plants breathe helps your blood vessels to “breathe” too. In other words, this molecule can expand your vessels naturally (without drugs), so that blood flows easier, your heart gets oxygen, and you stay healthy.   







4. What solutions for the reader’s problem (s) exist already (and why aren’t they working for them)?



Stenting – a tiny wire mesh tube inserted into an artery to keep it open and prevent plaque from closing it up. 



Angioplasty – done by threading a thin tube (catheter) through a small puncture in a leg or arm artery to the heart. The blocked artery is opened by inflating a tiny balloon to it. This helps to restore normal blood flow to your heart muscle. It’s short term.



Aspirin – reduces blood clotting and can help maintain blood flow. Millions of people are taking it daily who shouldn’t be. Can cause bleeding in GI Tract, also a bleeding stroke. Especially women over the age of 70. 

https://www.healthline.com/health-news/you-can-skip-your-daily-aspirin-regimen



Thrombolytics (drugs that are also known as clotbusters, they help dissolve a blood clot that’s blocking blood flow to your heart). Like Activase, Eminase, Retavase. Side effects include bleeding and oozing, fever, bleeding from other places in the body. 



You’ll be given other blood thinning medications like heparin to make your blood less sticky and less likely to form clots. 



Nitroglycern (nitrates) widen (dilate) blood vessels. 



ACE inhibitors. These drugs lower blood pressure and reduce stress to the heart. They try to keep your blood vessels wide, and prevent narrowing. Most popular include Lotensin, Capoten, Vasotec. Not super common side effects but fatigue, dizziness, headaches, loss of taste. 



Statins – these drugs control your blood cholesterol. But can cause also cause inflammation of muscles, memory loss, nerve pain, high blood sugar and type 2 diabetes. Types include Lipitor, Livalol, Zocor, etc.

https://www.webmd.com/cholesterol-management/side-effects-of-statin-drugs#2





Coronary artery bypass surgery: Sometimes happens as an emergency during a heart attack. Might happen after. This involves them sewing veins or arteries in place beyond a blocked or narrowed coronary artery, allowing blood flow to the heart to bypass the narrowed section. 







5. What’s the new claim/root cause/surprising info? And how does this new solution we’re offering them work? 

(Think about it as if they had 99% of the solution already, but you’re sharing that missing 1%...the easy but unexpected REAL REASON, or REAL SECRET to their success).







Your heart’s main job is to pump blood throughout your body...



And send it to organs and tissues…



Places like your brain, your lungs, your kidneys, your liver, and so on.  



In order for this blood to reach those organs and tissues though…



It must travel through a network of tube-shaped parts…



And those little tubes are called blood vessels. 



Now here’s the thing…



As we get older…



Our blood vessels become narrower…



They start to shrink…



And when this happens…



Blood can’t flow through your vessels as easily…



Which means your heart has to pump extra hard…



To get blood to the rest of our body.



The measurement of how hard our heart is working…



To push blood to our organs and tissues…



That’s called our blood pressure…



And the reason why having a high blood pressure is so bad…



Is because it’s a sign that our heart is overstressed and overworked.



And over time…



All this overtime work from your heart…



It creates a lot of force in your vessels…



Which leads to tiny little tears. 



Now tears in your heart vessels obviously aren’t good…



So your body tries to patch them up…



By creating something called “plaque”…



Which is a sticky substance made of cholesterol and some other compounds. 



At first, the plaque actually does help patch things up…



But the problem is that over time…



More tears lead to more plaque…



Until the plaque starts to build-up thicker-and-thicker…



And this build-up creates blocks in your blood vessels.



That’s when a vicious cycle starts to happen…



Because the more plaque clogs up your vessels and arteries…



The harder your heart has to pump…



And the faster new tears appear…



Leading to even more plaque...



Which makes your vessels even narrower. 



And once your vessels become too narrow and filled with plague…



They can even rupture, or explode. 



This explosion creates blood clots…



Which also block the flow of blood from your heart to your vital organs…



And the result of all of this…



Is stuff like heart attacks, heart failure, heart disease, thrombosis, stroke…



And pretty much everything else that keeps you up at night in a worried sweat.  



So if we want to protect our heart…



And keep our high blood pressure at bay…



It’s really as simple as keeping your blood vessels nice and expanded…



Or dilated…



That way blood can flow freely from your heart to the rest of your body…



And your heart doesn’t have to work overtime. 



Your body is already trying to do this from the day you’re born by the way…



By sending a gas called N.O. to those vessels and arteries…



That way they dilate, or expand…



Which allows blood to flow through them very easily…



And keeps your heart from being overworked.    



In your teenage years, your twenties, and even into your thirties…



Your body is creating N.O. all day long…



Sending it to your heart…



And keeping your vessels nice and wide...



Which is why you rarely hear about young people having heart attacks…



Or high blood pressure…



Because their bodies are producing plenty of N.O…



So their vessels stay wide…



Their heart pumps normally…



And there’s no plaque or blood clots to worry about.



The problem though…



Is that as we grow older…



Things begin to change. 



In fact, in a major new study…



That was published in the Journal of the American Heart Association…



Researchers followed 240 adults for four entire years…



And measured their N.O. levels continuously.



At the end of the study…



The scientists were surprised to find that:



The adults N.O. levels got lower and lower with each passing year…



The older the subject was, the less N.O. they had…



And there was a direct link between lower N.O. levels and heart problems. 



Now this study is extremely important…



Because it shows for the first time ever…



That the REAL reason behind high blood pressure…plaque…clots…



And all the terrible things they lead too…



Can be traced back to our declining levels of N.O. 



Solution:



Is to simply get our body to start producing more N.O. naturally…



That way our bodies go back to the way they were when we were young…



And we were never worried about heart attacks or high blood pressure or a stroke. 



There are certain plants that are able to do this…



They were discovered accidentally when scientists were trying to understand why certain plants can survive in a flood, while others suffocate and die. 









6. Paradoxical Question:



Why do you rarely hear about young people having heart attacks or high blood pressure?





7. Metaphor:



It’s like the timer in your heart stops counting down…



And starts ticking up…



And the feeling of confidence that washes over you…



When you’re no longer losing sleep due to haunting thoughts…



Or wondering who will look after your family…



In the event of a sudden heart attack or stroke…







8. Bold Claim 

(What’s the huge promise about the results they’re going to get using this product/solution?):



Immediately help to get erratic blood pressure back under control. 





9. What is the Product? 

(If you can write out fascinations here, it will help you immensely. This is the part where you get to shape exactly what the product we’re selling will include)





I call my creation NO-BP…



Because it’s loaded with Nitric Oxide activating polyphenols…



That support healthy heart function…



And immediately help to get erratic blood pressure back under control. 



Inside every single capsule of NO-BP…



You will find the 6 most polyphenol-rich ingredients known to science…



Ingredients that can activate your body’s internal production of N.O…



So that your heart stops working overtime…



And goes back to the healthy, pure state it was in when you were young. 



Product Specific: 



The 6 polyphenol rich ingredients inside each capsule of NO-BP are: 



N.O. Activating Ingredient #1 – Lowbush Blueberry Extract

N.O. Activating Ingredient #2 – Tart Montgomery Cherry Extract

N.O. Activating Ingredient #3 – Black Walnut Extract

N.O. Activating Ingredient #4 – Cocoa Flavanols

N.O. Activating Ingredient #5 – Olive Leaf Extract

N.O. Activating Ingredient #6 – Green Tea Extract



Plus I’ve also added Zinc, Potassium, Calcium, and Magnesium to NO-BP…



Because numerous studies show that when you’re deficient in any of these essential minerals…



It can lead to higher blood pressure, restricted arteries, heart attacks, and stroke.  









10. Background Story + Story of Discovery: 



The last thing John remembered was raising his glass into the air…



Smiling lovingly at his wife…



And saying “cheers.” 



Then…



Before John’s glass had reached his lips…



He made a faint, grunting sound…



And collapsed to the floor. 



John’s wife started to scream…



As a German nurse…



Who happened to be seated a few tables over…



Rushed towards John’s lifeless body…



Preparing to administer CPR. 



But by the time the nurse got to John…



He was already dead...



And that was only the first time John would die that day…



In the two hours that followed…



He would be declared “technically dead” two more times…



And each time…



Nurses, paramedics, and desperate doctors…



Would fight heroically to jumpstart John’s faltering heart back to life.  



The fact that John survived at all is a miracle…



His doctor later said that his odds of surviving the massive heart attack like that…



Were less than 10%...



And yet, as lucky as John was…



His life would never be the same. 



From there – just goes into standard doctor/expert who wants to help others avoid the scary fate that John suffered through.

Why high blood pressure could put you at risk of memory loss later in life. 





The hidden food additive found in flavored waters, iced teas, breakfast bars and hundreds of other supermarket ingredients…that’s been shown to raise your blood pressure dramatically. (https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2018/08/180823095948.htm)



The X hidden deficiencies in your body that increase high blood pressure…

Big Idea: 



Market

Women and men 45+ who are afraid that their heart is a ticking time bomb that will explode. 



Pain Point

Fear and anxiety about leaving their loved ones too early, and blood pressure not going down. 



Story

I died three times in a two-hour window. 

Doctor said that there was less than a 10% chance of me surviving but here I am. 



Mechanism



Your high blood pressure and heart risks aren’t caused by cholesterol, lifestyle habits, or even a bad diet. Instead they are being caused by a vanishing “Dilation Molecule” inside your body. This molecule is made by virtually every cell, and its job is to expand your blood vessels. But as you get older, levels of this molecule decline so your vessels stop expanding. Instead they grow narrower, causing your heart to have to work harder to pump out more blood, which in turn leads to HBP, tears, plaque, heart attacks, and more. The answer is to refuel your body with this Dilation Molecule because once you do that, your vessels widen, blood flow increases, etc. 





Promise



To quickly and rapidly lower your high blood pressure back to normal ranges, without taking a single drug. In fact, you’ll simply be using a newly discovered class of super nutrients found inside plants, that quickly increase levels of this molecule in your body while also making your heart more able to absorb it.
